plugins.name: AWS SigV4
plugins.summary: HarborClient plugin that signs outgoing HTTP requests with AWS Signature Version 4.
plugins.author: HarborClient

plugins.name: cURL
plugins.summary: Adds a tab to the request editor that shows an equivalent `curl` command for the configured request.
plugins.author: HarborClient

plugins.name: Dotenv
plugins.summary: HarborClient plugin that links a .env file to an environment and keeps variables in sync.
plugins.author: HarborClient

plugins.name: History
plugins.summary: A HarborClient plugin that records every successful HTTP request and response in a persistent footer panel.
plugins.author: HarborClient

plugins.name: Interval
plugins.summary: Adds a Timer tab to the request editor for interval polling and one-shot delayed sends.
plugins.author: HarborClient

plugins.name: JWT Inspector
plugins.summary: Scans response headers and body for JWT-shaped strings and decodes the selected token.
plugins.author: HarborClient

plugins.name: OpenAPI
plugins.summary: HarborClient plugin that imports an OpenAPI 3.x specification and creates a collection with requests grouped by the first tag on each operation.
plugins.author: HarborClient

plugins.name: Request History
plugins.summary: Records every completed HTTP request and displays them in a Recent Requests sidebar section.
plugins.author: HarborClient
